cycles.description: Extract testable modules + comprehensive unit tests for latexToHtml, error parser, latex checks, outline, template validator
improvements: Extracted latexToHtml to shared module src/lib/latex/latex-to-html.ts
Extracted error parser to src/lib/latex/error-parser.ts with human-readable errors
Extracted latex checks to src/lib/latex/latex-checks.ts with expanded ref detection (autoref/cref)
Extracted outline to src/lib/latex/outline.ts with chapter/part support
Added footnote, textsc, href, url, newpage rendering to latexToHtml
Human-readable error messages for 12 common LaTeX errors (UX improvement over Overleaf)
Package conflict detection expanded (5 known conflicts)
Environment order checking (not just count mismatch)
